CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Set For Trial On Apr-12-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Kaufman, Esq. 818-990-1999 The Kaufman Law Firm for Plaintiff/Responding party.
Michael Purcell, Esq. Barbara Harris Chiang, Esq. 650-265-0222 Silicon Valley Employment Law Firm for Defendant/Moving party.
Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
The Court hears arguments on both motions simultaneously.

Mr. Purcell contests and presents arguments; 2 issues: with leave to amend and 1st COA breach of contract claim; apologizes for error in exhibit 2, cites paragraph 17 of SAC.

Mr. Kaufman responds; no such thing as a free lunch, authorities cited on page 3 of brief, terminated before payment occured, cites excerpts from SAC, amendment not needed, issue on 4th COA.

Court comments and poses questions; states three theories.

Mr. Purcell's brief rebuttal; does not address express terms of contract.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1-Defendant Tonic AI, Inc.'s demurrer to Plaintiff Jacob Friedenberg's Second Amended Complaint (SAC)

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.comReported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs two orders. (see scanned order for details)***
